item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Compute Locations Location Cloudserviceosversions Osversionname

variable.description: (Required) Name of the location that the OS version pertains to.

request.description: Gets properties of a guest operating system version that can be specified in the XML service configuration (.cscfg) for a cloud service.

response.name: OK

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.body:
{
  "id": "<string>",
  "name": "<string>",
  "type": "<string>",
  "location": "<string>",
  "properties": {
    "family": "<string>",
    "familyLabel": "<string>",
    "version": "<string>",
    "label": "<string>",
    "isDefault": "<boolean>",
    "isActive": "<boolean>"
  }
}

response.name: Error

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
